scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix map-editor
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix map-editor
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix server && npm run typecheck --prefix client && npm run typecheck --prefix map-editor
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run build
